evidence_snippets: Ryan and Natalie sit stoically as a YOUNG ASIAN GUY rants about why they are idiots to fire him.
YOUNG ASIAN GUY ... And another thing...? You know
YOUNG ASIAN GUY (cont'd) I am the one thing preventing this
The young asian guy snaps up one of the PACKETS and leaves, slamming the door behind himself.
A professional African-American woman wearing a smart suit sits down at the conference table.
